features: Round tips: Each tip is rounded for extra comfort when combing from the root
Easy to use: Great plastic wide toothed comb, suitable for detangling all hair, especially curly hair. flexible and hardwearing
Practical design: The specially designed to evenly distribute the conditioner through your hair,helping you to add shine and a silky finish
Widely use: Suitable for both professional and home use.The salon hair cutting design,making the hair care and more smooth
Package include: 3 pcs plastic wide toothed comb for one package with color black, pink, purple, enough quantity can meet your family needs
